Problems Description : 

The integrated Ethernet Controller BroadCom BCM5708SKFB, Vendor: 0x14e4,
device : 0x16ac, revid: 0x11 is not supported by the standard bcm5708 driver.

The MPT driver seems not to be stable (active tests in progress...)

Fix: 

Maybe the BCM driver leaks the new PCI ID for the chip. Will try to
add/verify...
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 6.1, 6.2 Beta1 & 7.0 Current on DELL PE1955 with LSI SAS
controller (mpt version) & BCM5708SKFB / TS0615 P21 / 778299 N1 Network
controller.
